description_long: This minivan features a classic, retro design reminiscent of the Volkswagen Type 2, with a two-tone color scheme of mint green and white. The front displays a prominent VW logo, split windshield, and rounded headlights, while the sides have large rectangular windows and two doors on each side. The body is boxy with smooth, curved edges, and the wheels are simple with whitewall tires. The rear is flat and unadorned, with a bumper matching the front. The roof is solid and slightly domed, with no visible roof rack or accessories. The overall appearance suggests a vintage, utilitarian vehicle designed for passenger transport.
description: A vintage mint green and white minivan with a boxy shape, large windows, and a classic VW front logo. It has a smooth, retro design with simple wheels and no roof rack.
description_view_0: Front view shows the split windshield, VW logo, rounded headlights, and front bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals four large rectangular windows, two doors, and simple wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view is flat and plain, with a matching bumper and no visible windows or lights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with four windows and two doors visible.
attribute_window_configuration: Split front windshield, four large rectangular side windows per side, no visible rear window.
